What kind of animal has these 3 spofs?
A cheetah has these black 3 spots_
What kind of animal has these 5 spofs?
A fawn has these white 6 spots
What kind of animal has these Ip spofs?
A bug has these 8 tiny spots_
What kind of animal has no 6 spots?
